❌ Hosted Agent Sample Validation Failed

Failed Sample ${EMAIL_SAMPLE}
Workflow ${EMAIL_WORKFLOW}
Branch ${EMAIL_BRANCH}
Commit ${EMAIL_COMMIT}
Triggered By ${EMAIL_TRIGGERED_BY}
Actor ${EMAIL_ACTOR}
Run ID #${EMAIL_RUN_NUMBER} (${EMAIL_RUN_ID})

What to check

  • Open the run log (link below) and expand the failing step.
  • For dotnet samples: look for restore/build/publish errors in the Docker build output.
  • For python samples: look for pip install errors or a missing requirements.txt.
  • Check whether any placeholder ({{SafeProjectName}}, {{AgentName}}) was not replaced correctly.
